---
title: 'Pizza Inn @ Alliance'
date: '2012-02-08T22:50:00.0000000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: 'LIFE in Review (s)'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '5822652569182138450'
blogger_filename: '/2012/02/pizza-inn-alliance.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/LIFE in Review (s)/feed.atom'
categories:
  - 'Discover'
---

<div><h3>Pizza Inn</h3>A very cool alternative to CiCi's Pizza. Better Salad Bar!<br /><br />Of course my favorite is the Chocolate Chip and Vanilla Pudding Pizza!<br /><br /><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-20140116-194242-a14c7d4d8ef4.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img alt="Chocolate Chip and Vanilla Pudding Pizza" border="0" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-20140116-194242-a14c7d4d8ef4.jpg" height="296" title="Chocolate Chip and Vanilla Pudding Pizza" width="400" /></a></div><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"><br /></div><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"><br /></div></div><a href="http://www.urbanspoon.com/r/13/1601167/restaurant/North-Fort-Worth/Pizza-Inn-Fort-Worth"><img alt="Pizza Inn on Urbanspoon" src="/images/imported/www-urbanspoon-com/biglink-a9188284c4b5.gif" style="border: none; height: 146px; width: 200px;" /></a><br /><br /><br /><div><div style="color: #333333; font-family: Helvetica, Arial, 'Lucida Grande', Verdana, sans-serif; font-size: 16px; margin-bottom: 24px;"><h4><strong style="color: black;">Introduction</strong></h4></div><div style="color: #333333; font-family: Helvetica, Arial, 'Lucida Grande', Verdana, sans-serif; font-size: 16px; margin-bottom: 24px;"></div><div style="color: #333333; font-family: Helvetica, Arial, 'Lucida Grande', Verdana, sans-serif; font-size: 16px; margin-bottom: 24px;">This was a great experience. The kids enjoy it.<br /><br />We had to try this new (Been in Business since the 1960's but new to us) place called Pizza Inn. It was an absolute pleasure. If you've ever been to a CiCi's it's very much the same... just better.<br /><br /><b>Clean Fresh Environment. Friendly staff.</b> That was the first thing I noticed. The whole staff down to the very last person seemed genuinely happy to be there. I am big proponent of treating your staff well so that they treat the customers well. This place seems to do so.</div><div style="color: #333333; font-family: Helvetica, Arial, 'Lucida Grande', Verdana, sans-serif; font-size: 16px; margin-bottom: 24px;"><h4><strong style="color: black;">Food</strong></h4></div><div style="color: #333333; font-family: Helvetica, Arial, 'Lucida Grande', Verdana, sans-serif; font-size: 16px; margin-bottom: 24px;">The&nbsp;<strong style="color: black;">Pizza</strong>&nbsp;bar had more selection that CiCi's generally has without asking. The Manager/Chef was constantly calling out pizza's as they left the oven so the diners would know there was a new selection. There was always a new selection. He kept the trays full and&nbsp;varied.</div><div style="color: #333333; font-family: Helvetica, Arial, 'Lucida Grande', Verdana, sans-serif; font-size: 16px; margin-bottom: 24px;"><strong style="color: black;">Dessert</strong>&nbsp;<strong style="color: black;">Pizza's</strong>&nbsp;were no exception either. There was so many different kinds, unlike the two or three I'm used to. They even had a Chocolate Chip Cookie Pizza, which won my heart immediately.</div><div style="color: #333333; font-family: Helvetica, Arial, 'Lucida Grande', Verdana, sans-serif; font-size: 16px; margin-bottom: 24px;">There was also a FULL&nbsp;<strong style="color: black;">salad bar</strong>, different lettuce choices, many veggies,<strong style="color: black;">&nbsp;potato salad</strong>, macaroni salad, and two&nbsp;<strong style="color: black;">soups</strong>.&nbsp;</div><div style="color: #333333; font-family: Helvetica, Arial, 'Lucida Grande', Verdana, sans-serif; font-size: 16px; margin-bottom: 24px;">They carried Dr. Pepper AND Root Beer my favorite and my Wife's Favorite! Anyplace without Dr. Pepper is sub-par immediately... lol</div><div style="color: #333333; font-family: Helvetica, Arial, 'Lucida Grande', Verdana, sans-serif; font-size: 16px; margin-bottom: 24px;"><h4><strong style="color: black;">Cost</strong></h4></div><div style="color: #333333; font-family: Helvetica, Arial, 'Lucida Grande', Verdana, sans-serif; font-size: 16px; margin-bottom: 24px;">It's a bit more expensive than CiCi's. It was about $7 plus drinks per adult and $4 per kid, but there are coupons on the website you can print and bring in. It's also worth the extra because the experience was more enjoyable. I didn't feel like I was settling for less because I didn't have a "Full Service Restaurant" budget that day.</div><div style="color: #333333; font-family: Helvetica, Arial, 'Lucida Grande', Verdana, sans-serif; font-size: 16px; margin-bottom: 24px;"><h4><strong style="color: black;">Games</strong></h4></div><div style="color: #333333; font-family: Helvetica, Arial, 'Lucida Grande', Verdana, sans-serif; font-size: 16px; margin-bottom: 24px;">There was a small arcade that takes quarters, always a plus with kids. They also had four TV's to watch the Ranger Game on! Always a plus.</div><div style="color: #333333; font-family: Helvetica, Arial, 'Lucida Grande', Verdana, sans-serif; font-size: 16px; margin-bottom: 24px;"><h4><span data-mce-style="text-decoration: underline;" style="text-decoration: underline;"><strong style="color: black;">Tip for the Consumer:</strong></span></h4></div><div style="color: #333333; font-family: Helvetica, Arial, 'Lucida Grande', Verdana, sans-serif; font-size: 16px; margin-bottom: 24px;"><strong style="color: black;">Special Orders</strong>&nbsp;- You don't see what you want? Just ask anyone and they will special order it for you. And so that you don't feel bad, maybe you just wanted two slices and you don't want the rest going to waste, they'll just put it up and the bar and announce that a special order of XYZ Pizza is now available so you can get as much or little as you want. There have been so many times I didn't order what I wanted because I didn't want them to waste a whole pizza on me, not at Pizza Inn. They just put it up front and you get what you want. Easy, no pressure.</div><div style="color: #333333; font-family: Helvetica, Arial, 'Lucida Grande', Verdana, sans-serif; font-size: 16px; margin-bottom: 24px;"><strong style="color: black;">Bring some cash</strong>... there are people walking around constantly asking if you need anything, taking your empty/used plates. It would be a great idea to leave a few dollars as a "Thank you" Tip for the hard working young people. Also the coins would be helpful if you want to play the games.... ok, I'm sure it's just for the kids right?</div><div style="color: #333333; font-family: Helvetica, Arial, 'Lucida Grande', Verdana, sans-serif; font-size: 16px; margin-bottom: 24px;"><h4><b style="color: black; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-size: medium;">Have questions about anything I said here? Want to share your story? Comment Below!</b></h4></div><div style="color: #333333; font-family: Helvetica, Arial, 'Lucida Grande', Verdana, sans-serif; font-size: 16px; margin-bottom: 24px;"><div style="color: black; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-size: medium;"></div><br />By <a href="https://plus.google.com/+DarrellWolfe/posts?banner=pwa" target="_blank">DarrellWolfe</a><br /><br /><h4 style="color: black; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-size: medium;"><a href="flickr: LIF Master Set" target="_blank">Flickr Photos</a></h4><div style="color: black; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-size: medium; text-align: center;"><iframe align="center" frameborder="0" height="500" scrolling="no" src="http://www.flickr.com/slideShow/index.gne?group_id=&amp;user_id=106439236@N07&amp;set_id=72157641285188263&amp;tags=Food,Entertainment,FortWorth" width="500"></iframe><br /></div><div style="color: black; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-size: medium; text-align: center;"><small>Created with&nbsp;<a href="http://www.admarket.se/" title="Admarket.se">Admarket's</a>&nbsp;<a href="http://flickrslidr.com/" title="flickrSLiDR">flickrSLiDR</a>.</small></div><div style="color: black; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-size: medium;"><br /></div><div style="color: black; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-size: medium;"><br /></div><div style="color: black; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-size: medium;"><b>Life In Fort Worth By&nbsp;<a href="https://plus.google.com/+DarrellWolfe" target="_blank">Darrell Wolfe</a></b></div><h4 style="color: black; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-size: medium;">Blog Connect:</h4><ul style="color: black; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-size: medium;"><li><a href="http://www.lifeinfortworth.com/" target="_blank">www.LifeInFortWorth.com</a></li><li><a href="https://www.facebook.com/LifeInFortWorth" target="_blank">Facebook.Com/LifeInFortWorth</a></li><li><a href="http://twitter.com/DarrellWolfe" target="_blank">Twitter.Com/DarrellWolfe</a></li><li><a href="https://plus.google.com/b/103906191345996094295/+LifeInFortWorthBlog/posts" target="_blank">Google+ LifeInFortWorth</a></li><li>Flickr:&nbsp;<a href="http://www.flickr.com/photos/darrellwolfe/sets/72157641285188263/" target="_blank">LIF Master Set</a></li><li>Urban Spoon:&nbsp;<a href="http://www.urbanspoon.com/br/13/6359/life-in-fort-worth-dallas-fort-worth" target="_blank">Life In Fort Worth</a></li><li>Yelp:&nbsp;<a href="http://lifeinwortworth.yelp.com/" target="_blank">LifeInFortWorth.Yelp.Com</a></li></ul><h4 style="color: black; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-size: medium;">Connect:</h4><div style="clear: both; color: black; float: left; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-size: medium; padding-bottom: 10px;"><a href="https://www.facebook.com/DarrellGWolfe" imageanchor="1"><img alt="Follow me on Facebook" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/facebook-icon-436ed0b74b58.png" style="border: 0px; height: 32px; margin-left: 5px; margin-right: 5px; width: 32px;" />&nbsp;</a><a href="https://twitter.com/DarrellWolfe"><img alt="Follow  &lt;b&gt;YOUR-TWITTER-ACCOUNT-NAME&lt;/b&gt; on Twitter" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/twitter-logo-0d130abda9d2.png" style="border: 0px; height: 33px; margin-left: 5px; margin-right: 5px; width: 33px;" />&nbsp;</a><a href="http://www.youtube.com/user/darrellgwolfe"><img alt="Follow YOUR-CHANNEL-ID on YouTube" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/youtube-icon-df42b17a5900.jpg" style="border: 0px; height: 33px; margin-left: 5px; margin-right: 5px; width: 33px;" />&nbsp;</a><a href="http://feeds.feedburner.com/TexasLivingInfo" rel="alternate" type="application/rss+xml"><img alt="RSS subscription icon" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/rss-logo-d57cc3305733.jpg" style="border: 0px; height: 33px; margin-left: 5px; margin-right: 5px; width: 33px;" />&nbsp;</a>&nbsp;&nbsp; </div><div style="color: black; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-size: medium;"><br /></div><div style="color: black; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-size: medium;"><br /></div><h4 style="color: black; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-size: medium;"><b><br /></b></h4><div style="color: black; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-size: medium;"><i>Disclosure of Material Connection: Some of the links in the post above are â€œaffiliate links.â€ This means if you click on the link and purchase the item, I will receive an affiliate commission. I may also have received one or more of the products or services mentioned above for free in the hope that I would mention it on my blog. Regardless, I only recommend products or services I use personally and believe will add value to my readers. I am disclosing this in accordance with the Federal Trade Commissionâ€™s&nbsp;<a href="http://www.gpo.gov/fdsys/pkg/CFR-2003-title16-vol1/content-detail.html" target="_blank">16 CFR, Part 255</a>: â€œGuides Concerning the Use of Endorsements and Testimonials in Advertising.â€ A Big Thank You to&nbsp;<a href="http://michaelhyatt.com/five-ways-to-comply-with-the-new-ftc-guidelines-for-bloggers.html" target="_blank">Michael Hyatt</a>&nbsp;for helping us Bloggers with these new legal disclosure requirements.&nbsp;</i></div><h4 style="color: black; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-size: medium;"><b>What is YOUR favorite place to go? Comment Below!</b></h4></div></div>
